special_mechanics.name: Spin Tornado
special_mechanics.description: Taz spins into a tornado to defeat enemies, gain extra jump distance, knock away items, and bypass obstacles unharmed

special_mechanics.name: Fire Breath
special_mechanics.description: Eating chilli peppers allows Taz to breathe fire to defeat stronger enemies

special_mechanics.name: Item Consumption
special_mechanics.description: Taz can eat most objects throughout levels including health food, extra lives, continues, and projectiles (bombs, weed killer)

special_mechanics.name: Invincibility
special_mechanics.description: Eating a star grants temporary invincibility

tier_notes: Tier 3: No quantified movement or physics parameters found in available sources. Documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics and development history rather than technical movement data. SNES version is described as having different design from Genesis original but no movement specifics are detailed.
